mapper.insert: INSERT INTO h_diet_log (user_id, food_name, calories, protein, fat, carbs, gram, meal_type, record_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{foodName}, #{calories}, #{protein}, #{fat}, #{carbs}, #{gram}, #{mealType}, #{recordTime})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM h_diet_log WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY record_time DESC
